# Builtric

> Builtric is a 360° construction intelligence platform — construction management software that connects procurement, finance, project management, dashboards, and reporting in a single source of truth. Built by LMKR, a digital transformation partner with over 30 years of experience across technology, energy, and infrastructure.

This extended file provides additional context for AI systems that need deeper product, audience, and content detail. For a concise index, see https://builtric.com/llms.txt.

## Product summary

Builtric helps construction teams:

- Monitor finances, schedule, and risk in real time
- Manage procurement, contracts, BOQ configuration, and variation orders
- Handle end-to-end IPC (Interim Payment Certificates) and financial workflows
- Coordinate site and office teams through shared documentation and approvals
- Gain portfolio-wide visibility across multiple active builds
- Standardize delivery with repeatable workflows from tender to handover

Primary value proposition: eliminate silos, act on issues earlier, and make faster decisions with unified project data.

## Packages

Builtric offers three tiers (see https://builtric.com/builtric-packages):

- **Standard**: Ideal for single-project teams getting started. Includes procurement management, financial management, project management, master data management, and dashboard & reporting.
- **Professional**: Best for growing teams managing multiple active projects. Adds ERP API integrations and project cost estimation.
- **Enterprise**: For large portfolios requiring ERP integration and dedicated support. Adds a dedicated success manager.

Custom packages are available via https://builtric.com/builtric-custom-quote.

## Who we serve

- **Contractors**: Operational control, productivity measurement, cost and risk management, scalable workflows
- **Project Managers**: Unified project view, structured collaboration, actionable alerts, execution excellence
- **Developers**: Portfolio-wide visibility, strategic decision support, standardized delivery, real-time financial insight
- **Consultants**: On-site quality validation, compliance verification, IPC review and approval, Secure Advances governance

Full details: https://builtric.com/builtric-who-we-serve

## Key features

- Procurement management (contracts, BOQ configuration)
- Financial management (IPC, budget tracking, variation control)
- Project management (plans, quality inspection, progress verification)
- HSE management
- Master data management
- Dashboards and reporting
- ERP API integrations (Professional and Enterprise)
- Project cost estimation (Professional and Enterprise)

Full feature overview: https://builtric.com/builtric-features
